title: ocotea guianensis var. aurea
intro: Ocotea guianensis var. aurea, also known as Golden Sandalo or Ocotea, is a species of evergreen tree native to the rainforests of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Ocotea guianensis var. aurea tree are attributed to its essential oils, which contain compounds like caryophyllene, limonene, and guaiol, and have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ocotea guianensis var. aurea include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce stress, improve sleep, and support immune function. Ocotea guianensis var. aurea can be prepared as an essential oil, tea, or tincture, and is often used in aromatherapy and traditional herbal remedies.
